parameters.name: crm_unit_id
parameters.description: The PMS's unique identifier for the unit, within the authenticated company's scope.

parameters.name: Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Optional but strongly recommended on every write. A new UUID per logical operation; reuse the same UUID when retrying that operation. The server stores the key + request hash + response for 24 hours. Same key + same payload returns the cached response with no second write. Same key + different payload returns `409 Conflict`.
